title: CLAUDE.md
text: file provides guidance Claude Code (claude.ai/code) working code repository.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: mrgsim.ds Apache Arrow-backed simulation output package mrgsolve. stores simulation outputs Parquet files disk (tempdir()) rather -memory data frames, dramatically reducing memory footprint large pharmacokinetic/pharmacodynamic simulations enabling high-performance summarization via dplyr verbs.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: via make repo root: Run single test file R:
code: make doc        # Regenerate roxygen documentation (run after editing @-tags) make test       # Run testthat tests make check      # R CMD check (skips vignettes) make build      # Build package tarball make install    # Install from tarball make readme     # Render README.Rmd → README.md testthat::test_file("tests/testthat/test-own.R")

title: CLAUDE.md
text: central object data frame — ’s lightweight environment fields: - $ds — Arrow Dataset (lazy pointer parquet files disk) - $files — paths parquet files - $hash — xxh3_64 hashes files (used ownership system) - $pid — process ID object created - $gc — whether files auto-deleted GC finalization

title: CLAUDE.md
text: Two package-level hash environments (hash2addr, hash2file) map file hashes object memory addresses. “owner” file can move delete . Ownership transfers via take_ownership() / disown(). Files auto-delete GC owned. prevents accidental deletion objects copied passed contexts.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: Objects track $pid (creation process). Arrow Dataset pointers become invalid across forked processes. refresh_ds() rebuilds pointer file paths. GC finalizer runs original process avoid double-deletes parallel simulations.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: .global environment holds package-wide constants state: - file.prefix — "mrgsims-ds-" (prefix parquet files) - file.re — regex identify package-managed files - nullptr — sentinel externalptr used detect invalidated Arrow pointers - trashcan — subdirectory tempdir() used staging area file deletion Option mrgsim.ds.show.gc (set via options()) prints messages GC removes files — useful debugging ownership/cleanup issues.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: Parquet files written tempdir() pattern: e.g., mrgsims-ds-out2-0001.parquet
code: mrgsims-ds-{id}-{index}.parquet

title: Get Started
text: Load model using mread_ds() friends. model almost identical model loaded mread(); just extra information included make sure works well mrgsim.ds approach.
code: mod <- mread_ds("popex-2.mod", outvars = "IPRED, DV, ECL")

title: Get Started
text: simulate, call mrgsim_ds() output handles similar regular mrgsim() output

title: Get Started
text: Simulation files always initially stored tempdir() save outputs persistent location, use write_ds(). re-writes data single parquet file. can take time large outputs across multiple files. alternative rename move.
code: out <- lapply(1:10, \(x) mrgsim_ds(mod, data)) %>% reduce_ds()  list_temp() ## 10 files [2.9 Mb] ## - mrgsims-ds-1d1a10347727.parquet ## - mrgsims-ds-1d1a29ec75e2.parquet ##    ... ## - mrgsims-ds-1d1a55bd9194.parquet ## - mrgsims-ds-1d1a5db0c235.parquet write_ds(out, sink = file.path(save_dir, "regimen1")) rename_ds(out, "regimen-1") move_ds(out, save_dir)

what: Apache Arrow Dataset-Backed Simulation Outputs for mrgsolve
title: Apache Arrow Dataset-Backed Simulation Outputs for mrgsolve
text: mrgsim.ds provides Apache Arrow-backed simulation output object mrgsolve, greatly reducing memory footprint large simulations providing high-performance pipeline summarizing huge simulation outputs. arrow-based simulation output objects R claim ownership files disk. files automatically removed owning object goes scope becomes subject R garbage collector. “anonymous”, parquet-formatted files hold data tempdir() working R, functions provided move data permanent locations later use.

title: Apache Arrow Dataset-Backed Simulation Outputs for mrgsolve
text: ’ve integrated dplyr ecosystem well, allowing filter(), group_by(), mutate(), select(), summarise(), rename(), arrange() way directly pipeline summarize simulations using power Apache Arrow.
code: dd <-    out %>%    group_by(time) %>%    summarise(Mean = mean(IPRED, na.rm = TRUE), n = n()) %>%    arrange(time)  dd . FileSystemDataset (query) . time: double . Mean: double . n: int64 .  . * Sorted by time [asc] . See $.data for the source Arrow object collect(dd) . # A tibble: 481 × 3 .     time  Mean     n .    <dbl> <dbl> <int> .  1   0    0     6000 .  2   0.5  1.08  3000 .  3   1    1.77  3000 .  4   1.5  2.23  3000 .  5   2    2.55  3000 .  6   2.5  2.77  3000 .  7   3    2.91  3000 .  8   3.5  3.01  3000 .  9   4    3.08  3000 . 10   4.5  3.11  3000 . # ℹ 471 more rows

what: Files on disk are automagically managed
title: Apache Arrow Dataset-Backed Simulation Outputs for mrgsolve
text: arrow files stored tempdir() parquet format directory eventually removed R session ends. Tools provided manage space. also put finalizer object , goes scope, files automatically cleaned . First, run bunch simulations. 12 files holding simulation outputs. Now, remove one objects containing 10 files. soon garbage collector called, leftover files cleaned .
code: list_temp() . 11 files [145 Mb] . - mrgsims-ds-136b57a594b2d.parquet . - mrgsims-ds-136f93697cf0f.parquet .    ... . - mrgsims-ds-136fd1998f902.parquet . - mrgsims-ds-136fda03ff6f.parquet retain_temp(out2) . Discarding 1 files.  list_temp() . 10 files [131.8 Mb] . - mrgsims-ds-136f93697cf0f.parquet . - mrgsims-ds-136f94c391131.parquet .    ... . - mrgsims-ds-136fd1998f902.parquet . - mrgsims-ds-136fda03ff6f.parquet plan(multisession, workers = 5L)  out1 <- mrgsim_ds(mod, data) rename_ds(out1, "out1")  out2 <- future_lapply(1:10, \(x) { mrgsim_ds(mod, data) }, future.seed = TRUE)  out2 <- reduce_ds(out2) rename_ds(out2, "out2")  out3 <- mrgsim_ds(mod, data)  rename_ds(out3, "out3") list_temp() . 12 files [158.2 Mb] . - mrgsims-ds-out1-0001.parquet . - mrgsims-ds-out2-0001.parquet .    ... . - mrgsims-ds-out2-0010.parquet . - mrgsims-ds-out3-0001.parquet rm(out2) gc() .            used  (Mb) gc trigger  (Mb) limit (Mb) max used  (Mb) . Ncells  2308276 123.3    3828742 204.5         NA  3828742 204.5 . Vcells 15723850 120.0   26766118 204.3      16384 22237732 169.7  list_temp() . 2 files [26.4 Mb] . - mrgsims-ds-out1-0001.parquet . - mrgsims-ds-out3-0001.parquet

title: Apache Arrow Dataset-Backed Simulation Outputs for mrgsolve
text: mrgsim.ds tracks tempdir() location process ID (via Sys.getpid()) R process model loaded. simulation outputs saved file, save location always tempdir() parent R process. simulating parallel, likely different call tempdir() says worker node. time simulations saved, current R process id (pid) saved simulation output object. parallel simulation case, different pid parent R process, saved model object. finalizer function simulation object removes output files disk object goes scope run finalizer called parent R process determined Sys.getpid().

what: Set garbage collection behavior for mrgsimsds objects — gc_ds
title: Set garbage collection behavior for mrgsimsds objects — gc_ds
text: Controls whether underlying parquet files automatically deleted object garbage collected (value) whether message issued deletion occurs (notify). Set value = FALSE protect files cleanup; set back TRUE re-enable automatic deletion. notify flag intended debugging ; mrgsim.ds.show.gc option provides behavior package-wide. Calling gc_ds() value locks gc setting: value explicitly set, package never automatically change files moved written. warning issued gc locked TRUE files moved outside tempdir(), since files auto-deleted garbage collection.

title: Set garbage collection behavior for mrgsimsds objects — gc_ds
code: gc_ds(x, ..., value = NULL, notify = NULL)  # S3 method for class 'mrgsimsds' gc_ds(x, value = NULL, notify = NULL, ...)  # S3 method for class 'list' gc_ds(x, value = NULL, notify = NULL, ...)

title: Set garbage collection behavior for mrgsimsds objects — gc_ds
text: x mrgsimsds object list objects. ... used. value logical; TRUE underlying files deleted garbage collection. Passing value also locks gc setting subsequent file operations (see move_ds(), write_ds()) automatically adjust . notify logical; TRUE message issued files deleted garbage collection. debugging ; see also mrgsim.ds.show.gc option.

title: Set garbage collection behavior for mrgsimsds objects — gc_ds
text: x mrgsimsds object, returned invisibly gc /gc_notify updated. x list, returned invisibly gc_ds() applied every mrgsimsds element; non-mrgsimsds elements left unchanged.

title: Set garbage collection behavior for mrgsimsds objects — gc_ds
code: mod <- modlib_ds("popex", outvars = "IPRED") #> Building popex ...  #> done.  data <- ev_expand(amt = 100, ID = 1:5)  out <- mrgsim_ds(mod, data)  out <- gc_ds(out, value = FALSE)  out <- gc_ds(out, value = TRUE)  out <- lapply(1:3, function(rep) {   out <- mrgsim_ds(mod, data)   out })  out <- gc_ds(out, value = FALSE)

what: Manage simulated outputs in the per-session temporary directory — list_temp
title: Manage simulated outputs in the per-session temporary directory — list_temp
text: Functions inspecting cleaning package-managed parquet files tempdir(). list_temp() shows present; retain_temp() removes everything except files belonging specified objects; purge_temp() removes package-managed files unconditionally. Note: purge_temp() retain_temp() needed routine usage simulation output objects subject garbage collector. Calling active objects still point files cause errors next data access.

title: Manage simulated outputs in the per-session temporary directory — list_temp
code: list_temp(quietly = FALSE)  retain_temp(..., quietly = FALSE)  purge_temp(quietly = FALSE)

title: Manage simulated outputs in the per-session temporary directory — list_temp
text: quietly TRUE, messages suppressed. ... mrgsimsds objects whose files retained retain_temp(); non-mrgsimsds objects ignored warning.

title: Manage simulated outputs in the per-session temporary directory — list_temp
text: list_temp() returns character vector file paths invisibly, prints summary console unless quietly = TRUE. retain_temp() purge_temp() return NULL invisibly.

title: Manage simulated outputs in the per-session temporary directory — list_temp
code: mod <- house_ds()  out <- lapply(1:10, \(x) mrgsim_ds(mod))  list_temp() #> 15 files [143.7 Kb] #> - mrgsims-ds-1aaa10141577.parquet #> - mrgsims-ds-1aaa1f8dddd5.parquet #>    ... #> - mrgsims-ds-1aaaa6e6f71.parquet #> - mrgsims-ds-1aaab052f62.parquet  sims <- reduce_ds(out)  list_temp() #> 15 files [143.7 Kb] #> - mrgsims-ds-1aaa10141577.parquet #> - mrgsims-ds-1aaa1f8dddd5.parquet #>    ... #> - mrgsims-ds-1aaaa6e6f71.parquet #> - mrgsims-ds-1aaab052f62.parquet  retain_temp(sims) #> Discarding 5 files.  list_temp() #> 10 files [51.3 Kb] #> - mrgsims-ds-1aaa10141577.parquet #> - mrgsims-ds-1aaa2705545e.parquet #>    ... #> - mrgsims-ds-1aaa78c565a6.parquet #> - mrgsims-ds-1aaaa6e6f71.parquet  purge_temp() #> Discarding 10 files.  list_temp() #> No files in tempdir.

what: Move, rename, or write out data set files — move_ds
title: Move, rename, or write out data set files — move_ds
text: Use move_ds() change enclosing directory. write_ds() can also move files, always condenses simulation output single parquet file multiple files backing mrgsimsds object. operations made object place. important distinction write_ds() move_ds() rename_ds() multi-file objects. backing files can moved renamed little computational effort. multi-file simulation outputs, write_ds() need read file write data single file. Apache Arrow can efficiently, still additional, potentially noticeable computational effort.

title: Move, rename, or write out data set files — move_ds
text: move_ds() write_ds() automatically update gc flag based files end : files remain tempdir() keep gc = TRUE; files moved outside tempdir() get gc = FALSE, protecting automatic deletion. rename_ds() never changes gc flag change file location. automatic adjustment skipped gc setting locked prior call gc_ds(). warning issued gc locked TRUE files land outside tempdir(). object (x) required underlying files order move rename ; ownership required write_ds(). three functions modify x place file ownership stays x.

title: Move, rename, or write out data set files — move_ds
code: move_ds(x, path)  rename_ds(x, id)  write_ds(x, sink, ...)

title: Move, rename, or write out data set files — move_ds
text: x mrgsimsds object. path new directory location backing files. id short name used create data set files simulated output. sink complete path (including file name) single parquet file containing simulated data; passed arrow::write_parquet(). ... passed arrow::write_parquet(); files always written parquet format.

title: Move, rename, or write out data set files — move_ds
text: three functions return x invisibly. updated file list accessible via x$files.

title: Move, rename, or write out data set files — move_ds
code: mod <- house_ds()  out <- lapply(1:3, \(x) { mrgsim_ds(mod, events = ev(amt = 100)) })  out <- reduce_ds(out)  rename_ds(out, id = "example-sims")  basename(out$files) #> [1] "mrgsims-ds-example-sims-0001.parquet" #> [2] "mrgsims-ds-example-sims-0002.parquet" #> [3] "mrgsims-ds-example-sims-0003.parquet"  write_ds(out, sink = file.path(tempdir(), "example.parquet"))  basename(out$files) #> [1] "example.parquet"  if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{   move_ds(out, path = "data/simulated")  } # }

title: mrgsim.ds: 'Apache' 'Arrow' Dataset-Backed Simulation Outputs for 'mrgsolve' — mrgsim.ds

what: Simulate from a model object, returning an 'Apache' 'Arrow'-backed output object — mrgsim_ds
title: Simulate from a model object, returning an 'Apache' 'Arrow'-backed output object — mrgsim_ds
text: Runs mrgsolve::mrgsim() writes simulation output parquet file tempdir(), returning mrgsimsds object. Files tempdir() auto-deleted garbage collection default. Use move_ds() write_ds() relocate files outside tempdir(), automatically disables gc, call gc_ds() control gc directly. Note full argument names must used arguments.

title: Simulate from a model object, returning an 'Apache' 'Arrow'-backed output object — mrgsim_ds
code: mrgsim_ds(x, ..., tags = list(), verbose = FALSE, gc = TRUE)

title: Simulate from a model object, returning an 'Apache' 'Arrow'-backed output object — mrgsim_ds
text: x model object loaded mread_ds(), mcode_ds(), modlib_ds(), mread_cache_ds(), house_ds(). ... passed mrgsolve::mrgsim(). tags named list atomic data tag (mutate) simulated output. verbose TRUE, print progress information console. gc initial gc setting; TRUE, finalizer function attempt remove files object scope. value locked: move_ds() write_ds() automatically adjust gc based whether files remain tempdir(). lock gc setting prevent automatic adjustment, call gc_ds() creation.

title: Simulate from a model object, returning an 'Apache' 'Arrow'-backed output object — mrgsim_ds
text: object class mrgsimsds.

title: Simulate from a model object, returning an 'Apache' 'Arrow'-backed output object — mrgsim_ds
code: mod <- house_ds()  data <- ev_expand(amt = 100, ID = 1:10)  out <- mrgsim_ds(mod, data, end = 72, delta = 0.1)  out <- mrgsim_ds(mod, data, tags = list(rep = 1))  head(out) #> # A tibble: 6 × 8 #>      ID  time   GUT  CENT  RESP    DV    CP   rep #>   <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> #> 1     1  0      0     0    50    0     0        1 #> 2     1  0    100     0    50    0     0        1 #> 3     1  0.25  74.1  25.7  48.7  1.29  1.29     1 #> 4     1  0.5   54.9  44.5  46.2  2.23  2.23     1 #> 5     1  0.75  40.7  58.1  43.6  2.90  2.90     1 #> 6     1  1     30.1  67.8  41.4  3.39  3.39     1

code: # S3 method for class 'mrgsimsds' dim(x)  # S3 method for class 'mrgsimsds' head(x, n = 6L, ...)  # S3 method for class 'mrgsimsds' tail(x, n = 6L, ...)  # S3 method for class 'mrgsimsds' names(x)  # S3 method for class 'mrgsimsds' plot(   x,   y = NULL,   ...,   nid = 16,   batch_size = 20000,   logy = FALSE,   .dots = list() )

title: Interact with mrgsimsds objects — mrgsimsds-methods
text: x mrgsimsds object, output mrgsim_ds() as_mrgsim_ds(). n number rows return. ... arguments passed methods. y formula plotting simulated data; provided, columns plotted. nid number subjects plot. batch_size size batch reading data plot method. logy TRUE, plot data log y-axis. .dots list items pass mrgsolve::plot_sims().

title: Interact with mrgsimsds objects — mrgsimsds-methods
text: dim(): integer vector length 2 (rows, cols). head(), tail(): tibble first last n rows. names(): character vector column names. plot(): plot object, returned invisibly.

title: Interact with mrgsimsds objects — mrgsimsds-methods
text: head() tail() look first last file data set, respectively, simulations stored across multiple files. possible correspond first last chunks rows data see collecting data via dplyr::collect().

title: dplyr verbs for mrgsimsds objects — mrgsimsds-verbs
text: Standard dplyr verbs dispatched mrgsimsds object. verb extracts underlying Arrow Dataset forwards arguments corresponding dplyr generic, returning lazy Arrow query can materialized dplyr::collect().

code: # S3 method for class 'mrgsimsds' group_by(.data, ..., .add = FALSE, .drop = TRUE)  # S3 method for class 'mrgsimsds' select(.data, ...)  # S3 method for class 'mrgsimsds' mutate(.data, ...)  # S3 method for class 'mrgsimsds' filter(.data, ..., .preserve = FALSE)  # S3 method for class 'mrgsimsds' arrange(.data, ..., .by_group = FALSE)  # S3 method for class 'mrgsimsds' rename(.data, ...)  # S3 method for class 'mrgsimsds' summarise(.data, ..., .groups = NULL)  # S3 method for class 'mrgsimsds' distinct(.data, ..., .keep_all = FALSE)  # S3 method for class 'mrgsimsds' relocate(.data, ..., .before = NULL, .after = NULL)  # S3 method for class 'mrgsimsds' count(x, ..., wt = NULL, sort = FALSE, name = NULL)  # S3 method for class 'mrgsimsds' pull(.data, var = -1, name = NULL, ...)

title: dplyr verbs for mrgsimsds objects — mrgsimsds-verbs
text: .data, x mrgsimsds object. ... passed corresponding dplyr generic. .add, .drop passed dplyr::group_by(). .preserve passed dplyr::filter(). .by_group passed dplyr::arrange(). .groups passed dplyr::summarise(). .keep_all passed dplyr::distinct(). ., .passed dplyr::relocate(). wt, sort passed dplyr::count(). name passed dplyr::pull(). var passed dplyr::pull().

title: dplyr verbs for mrgsimsds objects — mrgsimsds-verbs
text: lazy Arrow query object. Use dplyr::collect() materialize result tibble. pull() exception — collects immediately returns vector.

title: dplyr verbs for mrgsimsds objects — mrgsimsds-verbs
Ownership of simulation files — ownership
text: Functions check ownership disown simulation output files disk. One situation need take ownership simulating parallel, simulation happens another R process. mrgsim.ds ownership established simulation returns mrgsimsds object created. happens another R process (e.g., worker node), way transfer information back parent process. case, call take_ownership() results returned parent process appropriate. Typically, results returned list call reduce_ds() create single object pointing owning multiple files. Therefore, rare call take_ownership() directly; , please make sure understand going .

title: Ownership of simulation files — ownership
code: ownership()  list_ownership(full.names = FALSE)  check_ownership(x)  disown(x)  take_ownership(x)

title: Ownership of simulation files — ownership
text: full.names TRUE, include directory path listing file ownership. x mrgsimsds object.

title: Ownership of simulation files — ownership
text: check_ownership: TRUE x owns underlying files; FALSE otherwise. list_ownership: data.frame ownership information. ownership: nothing; used side effects. disown: x returned invisibly; modified. take_ownership: x returned invisibly hash package-level ownership maps updated place.

title: Ownership of simulation files — ownership
code: mod <- house_ds()  out <- mrgsim_ds(mod, id = 1)  check_ownership(out) #> [1] TRUE  ownership() #> > Objects: 12 | Files: 21 | Size: 418.7 Kb  list_ownership() #>                               file        address #> 1  mrgsims-ds-1aaa78c565a6.parquet 0x5644e762c520 #> 2  mrgsims-ds-1aaa6c1cb585.parquet 0x5644e762c520 #> 3  mrgsims-ds-1aaa1f8dddd5.parquet 0x5644eeea5360 #> 4  mrgsims-ds-1aaa6e73999a.parquet 0x5644ee657b60 #> 5  mrgsims-ds-1aaa10141577.parquet 0x5644e762c520 #> 6                  example.parquet 0x5644ec0a7f38 #> 7  mrgsims-ds-1aaa4dfe41dd.parquet 0x5644ec9912a0 #> 8  mrgsims-ds-1aaa2705545e.parquet 0x5644e762c520 #> 9  mrgsims-ds-1aaa4a56b164.parquet 0x5644eb9f57c8 #> 10 mrgsims-ds-1aaa7e99c604.parquet 0x5644e303c470 #> 11 mrgsims-ds-1aaa35c53035.parquet 0x5644e762c520 #> 12 mrgsims-ds-1aaa564f9876.parquet 0x5644e762c520 #> 13 mrgsims-ds-1aaa2ae134f7.parquet 0x5644e762c520 #> 14 mrgsims-ds-1aaa38eec8f4.parquet 0x5644f1855128 #> 15  mrgsims-ds-1aaab052f62.parquet 0x5644ef1e6b08 #> 16  mrgsims-ds-1aaa1dc49a2.parquet 0x5644f07b4d90 #> 17  mrgsims-ds-1aaaa6e6f71.parquet 0x5644e762c520 #> 18 mrgsims-ds-1aaa2a46e766.parquet 0x5644f02c5100 #> 19 mrgsims-ds-1aaa6ce10b0c.parquet 0x5644e762c520 #> 20 mrgsims-ds-1aaa1eed8777.parquet 0x5644eee4e550 #> 21 mrgsims-ds-1aaa47011c44.parquet 0x5644e762c520  e1 <- ev(amt = 100) e2 <- ev(amt = 200)  out <- list(mrgsim_ds(mod, e1), mrgsim_ds(mod, e2))  sims <- reduce_ds(out)  ownership() #> > Objects: 13 | Files: 23 | Size: 472 Kb  check_ownership(sims) #> [1] TRUE  check_ownership(out[[1]]) #> [1] FALSE  check_ownership(out[[2]]) #> [1] FALSE

title: Prune a list of mrgsimsds objects — prune_ds
text: Filters mixed list elements mrgsimsds objects, dropping anything else (e.g. NULL, data frames, character vectors). passed single mrgsimsds object returned invisibly unchanged.

code: prune_ds(x, ..., inform = TRUE)  # S3 method for class 'mrgsimsds' prune_ds(x, ...)  # S3 method for class 'list' prune_ds(x, ..., inform = TRUE)

text: x list R objects single mrgsimsds object. ... used. inform (list method ) issue message objects list slots dropped.

text: x list, returned mrgsimsds objects retained. mrgsimsds objects found, empty list returned warning. x mrgsimsds object, invisibly returned.

what: Reduce a list of mrgsimsds objects into a single object — reduce_ds
title: Reduce a list of mrgsimsds objects into a single object — reduce_ds
text: Combines list mrgsimsds objects — typically replicate outputs parallel simulation — one object backed parquet files. Ownership every file transferred new object.

title: Reduce a list of mrgsimsds objects into a single object — reduce_ds
code: reduce_ds(x, ...)  # S3 method for class 'mrgsimsds' reduce_ds(x, ...)  # S3 method for class 'list' reduce_ds(x, ...)

title: Reduce a list of mrgsimsds objects into a single object — reduce_ds
text: x list mrgsimsds objects single mrgsimsds object. ... used.

title: Reduce a list of mrgsimsds objects into a single object — reduce_ds
text: x list, new mrgsimsds object returned owns underlying parquet files; input objects disowned. x mrgsimsds object, validated, refreshed, returned invisibly pid updated current process.

title: Reduce a list of mrgsimsds objects into a single object — reduce_ds
code: mod <- modlib_ds("popex", outvars = "IPRED") #> Loading model from cache.  data <- ev_expand(amt = 100, ID = 1:10)  out <- lapply(1:3, function(rep) {   out <- mrgsim_ds(mod, data)    out })  length(out) #> [1] 3  sims <- reduce_ds(out)  sims #> Model: popex #> Dim  : 14,460 x 3 #> Files: 3 [161.7 Kb] #> Owner: yes (gc) #>     ID time     IPRED #> 1:   1  0.0 0.0000000 #> 2:   1  0.0 0.0000000 #> 3:   1  0.5 0.8629376 #> 4:   1  1.0 1.5462311 #> 5:   1  1.5 2.0850748 #> 6:   1  2.0 2.5077949 #> 7:   1  2.5 2.8371897 #> 8:   1  3.0 3.0916080  check_ownership(sims) #> [1] TRUE  lapply(out, check_ownership) #> [[1]] #> [1] FALSE #>  #> [[2]] #> [1] FALSE #>  #> [[3]] #> [1] FALSE #>

title: Refresh 'Arrow' dataset pointers — refresh_ds
text: Arrow dataset pointers become invalid object created worker process returned head node (e.g. parallel simulation). refresh_ds() rebuilds pointer re-opening parquet files via arrow::open_dataset() updates pid dim place. refreshing fix invalid pointer, checks files exist call safe_ds() first.

title: Refresh 'Arrow' dataset pointers — refresh_ds
code: refresh_ds(x, ...)  # S3 method for class 'mrgsimsds' refresh_ds(x, ...)  # S3 method for class 'list' refresh_ds(x, ...)

title: Refresh 'Arrow' dataset pointers — refresh_ds
text: x mrgsimsds object list objects. ... future use.

title: Refresh 'Arrow' dataset pointers — refresh_ds
text: x mrgsimsds object, returned invisibly Arrow pointer, pid, dim refreshed place. x list, returned invisibly refresh_ds() applied every mrgsimsds element; non-mrgsimsds elements left unchanged.

title: Refresh 'Arrow' dataset pointers — refresh_ds
code: mod <- house_ds()  data <- ev_expand(amt = 100, ID = 1:100)  out <- lapply(1:3, function(rep) {   mrgsim_ds(mod, data) })  refresh_ds(out)

what: Save information about the R process that loaded a model — save_process_info
title: Save information about the R process that loaded a model — save_process_info
text: Stamps model object current process ID tempdir() path mrgsim_ds() knows write output files. called automatically mread_ds(), house_ds(), model-loading wrappers. Call directly load model base mrgsolve functions (e.g. mrgsolve::mread()) still want use mrgsim_ds().

title: Save information about the R process that loaded a model — save_process_info
code: save_process_info(x)

title: Save information about the R process that loaded a model — save_process_info
text: x model object.

title: Save information about the R process that loaded a model — save_process_info
text: updated model object suitable using mrgsim_ds().

title: Save information about the R process that loaded a model — save_process_info
code: mod <- mrgsolve::house()  mod <- save_process_info(mod)
